Localization.Description: A connection is allowed, denied or rejected by the ICAP server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from host {src.ip}:{src.port} to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is denied by ICAP server {subject.name}
A {protocol} connection from host {src.ip}:{src.port} to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is denied by ICAP server
A {protocol} connection from host {src.ip}:{src.port} to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is allowed by ICAP server
A {protocol} connection from host {src.ip}:{src.port} to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is allowed by ICAP server {subject.name}
